description: Create a GitHub Actions CD workflow that triggers on push and pull request events. The workflow should have read permissions for repository contents and set environment variables for OSX_QT_VERSION, OSX_POPPLER_VERSION, and OSX_QUAZIP_VERSION. It should have multiple jobs for building on different platforms (Windows 10, Linux, Mac OS X, and Mac OS X M1) with specific steps for each job, including checking out the code, installing dependencies, configuring, building, and packaging the application.
